ValidationRule.description: To ensure consistency between Salesforce and VRS, please contact the Data Solution team before making any changes to the “Expected Lag” and “Request frequency” fields.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), OR( ISCHANGED(Date_expected_for_delivery__c), ISCHANGED(Report_frequency__c) ), NOT($Permission.SuperUserDataSolutions) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To ensure consistency between Salesforce and VRS, please contact the Data Solution team before making any changes to the “Expected Lag” and “Request frequency” fields.
